message:
fix(ci): restrict Windows test matrix to cross-platform crates only

Limits Windows CI testing to rch-wkr and rch-telemetry crates which
are designed to be cross-platform. Other crates have dependencies on
Unix-specific functionality (Unix domain sockets, rich_rust terminal
features) that prevent them from compiling on Windows.

Previous behavior: --no-default-features --workspace (fails on Unix deps)
New behavior: --no-default-features -p rch-wkr -p rch-telemetry

This allows CI to verify that the worker and telemetry crates maintain
Windows compatibility while not attempting to build crates that are
intentionally Unix-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -164,7 +164,8 @@ jobs:
             cargo_args: --workspace
           - name: windows-x64
             os: windows-latest
-            cargo_args: --no-default-features --workspace
+            # Windows: only test rch-wkr (cross-platform worker) - other crates have Unix/rich_rust deps
+            cargo_args: --no-default-features -p rch-wkr -p rch-telemetry
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     timeout-minutes: 30
     needs: check
